testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.auth.jwt.JwtAuthenticationEntryPointTest

testcase.name: commence emits JSON 401 with stable error envelope()
commence is a no-op when the response is already committed()

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-02T23:50:28.804+09:00 DEBUG 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.a.jwt.JwtAuthenticationEntryPoint : Unauthenticated request rejected path=/api/protected reason=internal: cookie decoded but no session 2026-05-02T23:50:28.805+09:00 DEBUG 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.a.jwt.JwtAuthenticationEntryPoint : Unauthenticated request rejected path=/api/protected reason=anything 2026-05-02T23:50:28.805+09:00 DEBUG 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.a.jwt.JwtAuthenticationEntryPoint : Response already committed; skipping JSON 401 body for path=/api/protected
